title: 2004 Evangelion Single Aki
wikitext:
[]: 2004 Evangelion Single??? Aki???             Quote Post by Xero759 » Sat Feb 23, 2008 5:41 am Ok, random iTunes surfing has turned up something i've NEVER seen before... [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL] [URL=http://g.imageshack.us/g.php?h=508&i=whatisthisky8.png] [/URL] what is this???

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sat Feb 23, 2008 12:39 pm I'm inclined to think that it's just an indexing mistake. Reference to album on other sites: http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=DAKWOOZ-1 http://www.jpophelp.com/scripts/newsite/proddetails.asp?listid=JPN-DAKWOOZ-1 Just some minor jpop release.

[]:             Quote Post by Xero759 » Sat Feb 23, 2008 6:26 pm Your probably right, Eva turns up some odd jazz/techno albums in iTunes as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 04, 2008 3:54 pm IIRC in terms of those versions of Fly Me~: Aya versions of the song=Asuka/Yuko Miyumura Aki versions=Yoko Takahashi Also, this chick that linked to sounds sort of like Ogata. (There's a sample of her voice on the CDJapan link.)
